ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school or organization the team represents */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "formation_date" TEXT /* Date the team was formed */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the competition */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the competition */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the competition */,
  "competition_type" TEXT /* Type of competition (e.g., regional, national, international) */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization or person organizing the competition */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the competition's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being ranked */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team */,
  "ranking_score" INTEGER /* Score used to determine the ranking */,
  "penalty_points" INTEGER /* Penalty points incurred during the competition */,
  "qualifying_score" INTEGER /* Score required to qualify for the next round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing the match */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., qualifying, final) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Specific venue where the match was held */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee overseeing the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being measured */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "auto_score" INTEGER /* Autonomous score */,
  "scale_score" INTEGER /* Scale score */,
  "challenge_score" INTEGER /* Challenge score */,
  "defense_score" INTEGER /* Defense score */,
  "teleop_score" INTEGER /* Teleoperated score */,
  "penalty_count" INTEGER /* Number of penalties incurred */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate percentage for the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, team member) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_in_team" TEXT /* Role of the user within the team (e.g., captain, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition administrator */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "admin_role" TEXT /* Specific role of the administrator (e.g., head admin, assistant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_admins_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_admins_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "score_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score history entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the team in the match */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of score (e.g., match score, penalty score) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_score_history_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_score_history_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_score_history_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log entry was created */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the log */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., INFO, ERROR, WARNING) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
